title: lathyrus asphodeloides
intro: Lathyrus asphodeloides, also known as the yellow vetchling or the yellow pea, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus asphodeloides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus asphodeloides can be used as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
